title: What would happen if EVA 03 never got possesed
display_title: What would happen if EVA 03 never got possesed
wikitext:
[]: What would happen if EVA 03 never got possesed?             Quote Post by mauricep3 » Fri Feb 02, 2007 6:09 pm When I first saw EVA 03 I was eager to see it in action. But it got possesed and destoyed :cry: I kept on wondering would happened if it never got destroyed. What's your opinion on this P.S. I'm new here

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Feb 02, 2007 6:14 pm Here's something I prepared earlier , for the related "What if Evas 3 and 4 lived..." So EVA-03 and EVA-04 make it safely to Tokyo-3; pilots Suzuhara and Horaki are inducted. Something in the initial tests makes Touji come over all protective in a "a guy's gotta do what a guy's gotta do" sort of way. Hikari thinks she's finally gotten through to him but he's still oblivious; and we have another disconnected couple. Meanwhile Bardiel manifests, and I'm afraid it's Asuka who looks most disposable at this point. EVA-02 goes amok. Hikari and Shinji won't fight; Rei is ineffective, Touji tries but hesitates at a critical moment, and then - well things get a bit like in NXE. Asuka spends the rest of the series in Room 303. Hikari tries to comfort Shinji, but he can't face human contact, and quits. Zeruel arrives and it's up to Touji and then Rei to try and hold it back. When EVA-03 falls, it's Hikari who then oversynchs in EVA-04 while Shinji is talking gardening and philosophy with Kaji. Rei takes the lead against Arael as planned; retreats promptly, and then employs the Lance Armisael vs Shinji, Rei and Touji (Hikari is held back for the same reason that canonically Shinji was) - this one could go in any of a number of different ways; but rather than saying that 3 Evas are enough to defeat it, say that Touji has to sacrifice himself. Ritsuko and Shinji still play out their parts for the rest of that episode. Cue Tabris, and a brief Hikari/Kaworu pairing (Has anyone ever done that pairing before???) End-game: Gendo's scenario is having to be revised on the fly as Yui-sama doesn't have an S2; SEELE are probably happy enough to employ EVA-04 as the medium for their plan. Shinji is probably useless, but would be stuffed into the entry-plug and EVA-01 dropped to the bottom of the lake while Hikari, operating without Asuka's limits, is able to eventually take down the harpies. Instrumentality proceeds as GNR erupts - but who guides the process? Ikari-kun who is calling from the bottom of the lake, or Hikari in the spiritually active EVA-04? Hikari's outcome would, I feel, be tidier than Shinji's.

[]: Re: What would happen if EVA 03 never got possesed?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 02, 2007 6:31 pm mauricep3 wrote: When I first saw EVA 03 I was eager to see it in action. But it got possesed and destoyed :cry: I kept on wondering would happened if it never got destroyed. What's your opinion on this

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Feb 02, 2007 8:48 pm They would have used it. Duh.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Feb 02, 2007 8:53 pm Mr. Tines wrote: End-game: Gendo's scenario is having to be revised on the fly as Yui-sama doesn't have an S2; SEELE are probably happy enough to employ EVA-04 as the medium for their plan.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Feb 03, 2007 8:56 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: EVA-04 can't be used as a medium.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Feb 03, 2007 9:21 am Mr. Tines wrote: And your reasoning behind that statement is...? Don't forget that Horaki-sama would be S² equipped.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Sat Feb 03, 2007 10:42 am ok...why the heck would they choose horaki for the magnificent Eva unit 4?! xD

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Feb 03, 2007 10:50 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Uh huh, sure she would :roll: . Rei was the one calling ALL the shots. She hijacked the whole process and did whatever Ikari-kun said.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Feb 03, 2007 11:25 am Had Rei felt inclined she could have done so after she returned home. Note how I said she hijacked the whole process. Once she showed up she could have just said GAME OVER now go home.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Feb 03, 2007 11:59 am I think AEF and I are in fundamental and irresolvable disagreement here. "So, what's new?" I hear you ask.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Feb 03, 2007 12:27 pm I'll give you that Yui had a plan. Rei just so happened to surpass Yui at that point. If she wanted to she could have made everyone very unhappy that day. As I've said elsewhere Rei defaulted to Yui's plan, so in that sense Yui was doing the steering. Just because Rei didn't do something doesn't mean she can't. Come end of the movie and Yui was at the Uber-Seed level and could do whatever she wanted. Note I said if she wanted to , a lot. Not that she would.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 03, 2007 12:35 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Rei may have been the engine, but Yui was doing a lot of the steering (e.g. fetching back the LnY from the Moon ).

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sat Feb 03, 2007 1:59 pm Reichu wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: I think lots and lots of other NGE nerds and I are in fundamental and irresolvable disagreement here and over numerous other issues.

[]:             Quote Post by Nukie » Sat Feb 03, 2007 3:29 pm Was it confirmed that Eva-04 had Hikari's Mama in it?

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sat Feb 03, 2007 4:16 pm Nukie wrote: Was it confirmed that Eva-04 had Hikari's Mama in it?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sat Feb 03, 2007 9:00 pm unpossesed 03= MORE TOUJI!!!!!= HAPPY ME!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sun Feb 04, 2007 5:14 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Stuff

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Feb 04, 2007 5:42 pm Space Penis wrote: Do it. Now. It is commanded.

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Sun Feb 04, 2007 6:22 pm Reichu wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: Rei may have been the engine, but Yui was doing a lot of the steering (e.g. fetching back the LnY from the Moon ).
